title: A Teenager's Surgery and the Rival Musician
article_text: A teenager named Tom had to have surgery on his eyes because of an illegal cigarette that his rival threw at him. The doctor said the offense was serious, but he could detect the problem and fix it with a moderate operation. Tom's cousin, a historian, admired the doctor's skill and said it had universal significance. After the surgery, Tom's vision was visual and clear, and he could see the tower in the distance. The hospital was a charity that helped people without adequate money. A consultant from the hospital gave Tom a shower of gifts and support. Tom's friend, a musician, played a song for him on the tube to celebrate. The musician's music was so beautiful that it seemed to constitute a universal language of healing. Tom wished he had never met his rival, but he was grateful for the help he had received. The historian wrote a report that specified the exact details of the event and characterized it as a story of hope.

sentences.en: A teenager named Tom had to have surgery on his eyes because of an illegal cigarette that his rival threw at him.
sentences.zh: 一个名叫汤姆的青少年因为他的对手扔了一支非法香烟而不得不接受眼部手术。

image_prompts: A teenage boy with bandages over his eyes lying in a hospital bed, a doctor standing nearby, a broken cigarette on the floor, and a rival boy looking angry outside the window.
A doctor pointing at an eye chart and speaking to a patient, with a diagram of an eye on the wall, showing a moderate surgical plan.
A historian in glasses writing notes while looking at a doctor with admiration, with a globe in the background symbolizing universal significance.
A teenage boy smiling with clear eyes, looking out a window at a tall tower in the distance, sunlight streaming in.
A hospital building with a sign 'Charity Hospital' and a poor family receiving care, with a money box labeled 'Donations'.
A consultant in a suit giving a pile of gifts and a supportive handshake to a teenage boy in a hospital room.
A musician playing a guitar on a subway train (tube) while a teenage boy listens happily, other passengers smiling.
A close-up of musical notes floating from a guitar, transforming into a glowing heart, symbolizing a universal language of healing.
A teenage boy in a hospital bed with a thoughtful expression, looking at a photo of his rival with mixed feelings.
A historian writing a report at a desk, with a photo of the teenage boy and the doctor on the wall, and a title 'A Story of Hope'.
